subcodes.first_line: The dewdrops of inspiration, descending from the leaves of the Divine Lote-Tree, through the aid of the breezes of the Will of the Lord of Names, have taken the form of these words [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رشحات الهام از اوراق سدره منتهی باعانت نسیم اراده مالک اسما بصورت این کلمات
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @prophecy and fulfillment, @unity; oneness of humanity
